title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship to head to Canary Islands as Swiss confirm new case
summary_full: More than 140 people remain on the Hondius, which will take about three days to reach the Spanish archipelago for screening. A local official has criticized the plan.
summary_public: More than 140 people remain on the Hondius, which will take about three days to reach the Spanish archipelago for screening. A local official has criticized the plan.
